design.silhouette: 불규칙한 윤곽, 에테르 잔상이 실루엣을 번지게 함
design.armor: 감각 차단 경갑 + 허공 에너지로 짜인 반투명 외투
design.weapon: 허공 단열검 (칼날이 차원 균열로 구성) + 부유 결정
design.accessories: 팔에 차원 균열 문양, 발밑 공간 왜곡 이펙트

front.prompt: Create a 2D pixel art RPG character design sheet, front view, full body, standing idle pose. The character is a Void Wanderer — a dimensional traveler in dark fantasy Korean MMORPG style. They wear sensory-dampening light armor with a semi-transparent overcoat woven from void energy. Their silhouette is irregular with ether afterimage blur at the edges. They wield a void fracture blade whose blade is made of dimensional rift energy glowing magenta. A floating void crystal hovers near their off-hand. Dimensional crack patterns mark their arms, and space distortion effects warp at their feet. Colors: deep midnight, pale silver-blue, void black, and magenta glow. Art style: 512x512 pixel art with clean sharp pixel edges, 2px black outline, no anti-aliasing on borders, 2.5 head-to-body chibi proportions. Transparent background. Top-left 45-degree lighting with 3-step cel shading. Dark fantasy atmosphere with subtle glowing elements. DO NOT include text, watermarks, or 3D effects.
